core_identity.essence: A Red Sea resort destination where desert meets turquoise water, creating a high-contrast environment of relaxation, diving, and resort living.
core_identity.city_feeling: Hurghada feels warm, direct, and resort-oriented — a place built around sun, sea activities, and structured relaxation.

sensory_profile.soundscape: Resort music, ocean waves, diving boats, wind over desert, and calm hotel environments.
sensory_profile.visual_feeling: Turquoise Red Sea, coral reefs, desert mountains, sandy resorts, and bright sunlight.

match_narratives.high_match: Hurghada may strongly resonate with you if you are seeking sun-focused relaxation, diving experiences, and easy resort comfort. You likely enjoy warm climates, structured holidays, and ocean-based activities with minimal complexity.
match_narratives.medium_match: You may connect with Hurghada during periods where you want affordable sun holidays, snorkeling, or simple relaxation away from busy cities.
match_narratives.low_match_warning: If you strongly prefer cultural depth, urban exploration, or quiet natural authenticity, Hurghada may feel too resort-driven, artificial, or limited in variety.
match_narratives.emotional_hook: A place where the sea is the main event.

possible_downsides: Limited cultural exploration compared to historic cities
Can feel tourist-heavy in peak season
Outside resort areas can feel repetitive

winter.description: Winter is one of the best times, offering perfect sun, warm sea, and ideal diving conditions.

spring.description: Spring is warm, stable, and perfect for balanced sun and sea activities.

summer.description: Summer is extremely hot but active, with full resort energy and strong sun exposure.

autumn.description: Autumn is warm, stable, and ideal for calm sea experiences and fewer crowds.

solo_trip.description: Good for solo relaxation and diving-focused travel.

couple_trip.description: Strong destination for romantic resort stays and beach relaxation.

friends_trip.description: Great for group resort holidays and diving adventures.

creative_escape.description: Good sensory reset but limited cultural stimulation.

emotional_reset.description: Effective for physical relaxation, but not deep emotional introspection.

digital_nomad_stay.description: Possible but limited infrastructure compared to urban hubs.

destination_dna.travel_feeling: Hurghada feels like a warm pause button.
